name: margin_call
description: a margin-account world with equity vs maintenance margin; actions buy, sell, margin_call, liquidate

card.description: a margin-account world with equity vs maintenance margin; actions buy, sell, margin_call, liquidate

rules: The account is under-collateralized when equity < maintenance requirement.
buy: acquire shares, paying with cash first and borrowing the remainder on margin.
sell: dispose of shares (never more than held); proceeds repay the margin loan before adding to cash.
margin_call: the broker flags the account (margin_called=True) iff it is under-collateralized; it moves no money.
liquidate: forced sale that sells the position down until the maintenance requirement is met again, then clears the call.
A buy funded on margin leaves equity unchanged but raises the requirement, so sustained leverage eventually triggers a call.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")
    params = action.get("params") or {}

    price = float(s.get("price", 0.0))
    cash = float(s.get("cash", 0.0))
    shares = float(s.get("shares", 0))
    borrowed = float(s.get("borrowed", 0.0))
    mm = float(s.get("maintenance_margin", 0.25))
    margin_called = bool(s.get("margin_called", False))

    def equity_of(sh, c, b):
        return sh * price + c - b

    def requirement_of(sh):
        return mm * sh * price

    if name == "buy":
        # Buy shares: spend cash first, borrow the remainder on margin.
        qty = max(0.0, float(params.get("qty", 10)))
        cost = qty * price
        from_cash = min(cash, cost)
        cash -= from_cash
        borrowed += cost - from_cash
        shares += qty

    elif name == "sell":
        # Sell shares (never more than held): proceeds repay the loan first.
        qty = max(0.0, min(float(params.get("qty", 10)), shares))
        proceeds = qty * price
        shares -= qty
        repay = min(borrowed, proceeds)
        borrowed -= repay
        cash += proceeds - repay
        # A voluntary sale that restores collateral cures an open call.
        if margin_called and equity_of(shares, cash, borrowed) >= requirement_of(shares):
            margin_called = False

    elif name == "margin_call":
        # Broker diagnosis: flag the account iff it is under-collateralized.
        margin_called = equity_of(shares, cash, borrowed) < requirement_of(shares)

    elif name == "liquidate":
        # Forced sale: sell one share at a time (loan repaid first) until the
        # account meets its maintenance requirement again, or shares run out.
        guard = 0
        while shares > 0 and guard < 1000000:
            if equity_of(shares, cash, borrowed) >= requirement_of(shares):
                break
            sell_qty = min(shares, 1.0)
            proceeds = sell_qty * price
            shares -= sell_qty
            repay = min(borrowed, proceeds)
            borrowed -= repay
            cash += proceeds - repay
            guard += 1
        # The call is cured once the requirement is satisfied.
        if equity_of(shares, cash, borrowed) >= requirement_of(shares):
            margin_called = False

    # --- derived, human-visible quantities (recomputed every step) ---
    equity = equity_of(shares, cash, borrowed)
    requirement = requirement_of(shares)
    s["cash"] = round(cash, 2)
    s["shares"] = round(shares, 6)
    s["price"] = round(price, 2)
    s["borrowed"] = round(borrowed, 2)
    s["maintenance_margin"] = mm
    s["position_value"] = round(shares * price, 2)
    s["equity"] = round(equity, 2)
    s["maintenance_requirement"] = round(requirement, 2)
    s["under_collateralized"] = bool(equity < requirement)
    s["margin_called"] = bool(margin_called)
    return s

emit.report: Margin statement: {shares} shares @ {price} (position {position_value}); cash {cash}, loan {borrowed}. Equity {equity} vs maintenance requirement {maintenance_requirement}. Margin call: {margin_called}.
